question_text: Where do I download the invoice?
expected_response: Invoices are available under Billing > History > Download PDF.
source_text: Invoices are PDF-rendered on demand and retained for 12 months.

expected_response: Resend after 60 seconds; if it still fails fall back to backup codes.
source_text: 2FA delivery uses an SMS provider with retries every 60s; backup codes always work.

question_text: Can I change my email address?
expected_response: Yes from Settings > Account > Email; you'll need to re-verify.
source_text: Email changes require re-verification and revoke active sessions on the old address.

expected_response: Application logs are retained 30 days; audit logs 1 year.
source_text: Retention windows are 30 days for application logs and 365 days for audit logs.
